CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks VPCs have attached nodes
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks VPCs have at least one node attached, identifying unused network segments that may indicate misconfiguration or forgotten resources.
Risk: VPCs without attached nodes may indicate unused network segments or misconfiguration that weakens segmentation.

Recommendation.Text: Attach nodes to VPCs that are in use, or remove empty VPCs that are no longer required.
